=== Ready Blocks ===
Contributors: openai
Tags: blocks, testing
Requires at least: 6.4
Tested up to: 6.9
Requires PHP: 8.1
Stable tag: 1.3.0
License: GPL-2.0-or-later
License URI: https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-2.0.html

Demonstrates a WordPress-ready plugin repository managed by wp-plugin-base.

== Description ==

Ready Blocks provides a minimal fixture that passes the managed readiness checks.

== Changelog ==

= 1.3.0 =
* Update - Initial release.
